Video.summary: Huskies can have heterochromia, a condition where one eye is blue and the other is brown.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies
TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies
TPC That's My Pet | Siberian Huskies

Video.summary: Did you know cats have 230 bones? That’s a whopping 24 more bones than humans!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Cats

Video.summary: Did you know puppies are born blind and deaf?!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Puppies

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 70 different species of turtles?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Turtles

Video.summary: Did you know the biggest difference between Ponies and Mini Horses are the height? Ponies are under 58 inches while mini horses are under 34 inches tall!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ponies

Video.summary: Did you know that there are 260 types of monkeys in the world?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Monkeys

Video.summary: Did you know that Pigs can trot up to 11 miles per hour ?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pigs

Video.summary: Did you know that baby dogs were called whelps until the late 16th century?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pups

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 2 million farms in the US alone?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals
TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals
TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals

Video.summary: Did you know that ducks are waterproof?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ducks

Video.summary: Did you know that labradors are originally from Newfoundland?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Labradors

Video.summary: Did you know that Poodles are the second most intelligent dog?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Poodles
